name: Cloud Platform
description: Kubernetes-based hosting platform on AWS for cloud-native applications. Self-service, with built-in monitoring, logging, and auto-scaling.

name: Modernisation Platform
description: AWS account-based hosting for applications that don't fit Cloud Platform — typically legacy systems and non-containerised workloads.

name: Analytical Platform
description: Data analysis environment providing RStudio, JupyterHub, and Airflow for data scientists and analysts across the Ministry of Justice.

name: GOV.UK Pay
description: Take and process payments for government services. RESTful API with sandbox environment for testing.

name: GOV.UK Notify
description: Send emails, text messages, and letters to users of your service. Free for government teams.

name: Developer Portal
description: The Ministry of Justice Developer Portal repository: a cross-government developer experience site that aggregates products, documentation, guidelines, and SBOM visibility.

name: Ministry of Justice Design Systems
description: Design patterns and components for Ministry of Justice services, built for trust, clarity, and mission-critical delivery.

name: GOV.UK Frontend
description: Implementation docs for the GOV.UK Design System components and styles.

name: GOV.UK Prototype Kit
description: Rapid prototyping toolkit for GOV.UK services.

name: GOV.UK Forms
description: No-code form builder for government services.
